title: rosa pimpinellifolia subsp. alpina
intro: Rosa pimpinellifolia subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa pimpinellifolia subsp. alpina include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
